dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3479 IS: No Tax Exemptions For Terror Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Scott of Florida (for himself and Mrs. Blackburn) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To specify that the Council on American-Islamic Relations shall not be treated as described in section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the No Tax Exemptions For Terror Act.

section.header: Council on American-Islamic relations subject to taxation

subsection.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Council on American-Islamic Relations shall not be treated as described in section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986.
This section shall apply to taxable years ending after the date of the enactment of this Act.
